title: Fraunhofer Study Finds Some PHEVs Use 3 Times More Fuel Than Claimed
description:
A study by Fraunhofer ISI finds many German built PHEV models use far more gasoline than their manufacturers claim.

The post Fraunhofer Study Finds Some PHEVs Use 3 Times More Fuel Than Claimed appeared first on CleanTechnica.
